About.Name: Van Huy Tran
About.AboutText: Hi, I am Van Huy Tran. I'm a Computer Science student at Seattle Pacific University with a strong background in web and game development. I’ve always been fascinated by how complex systems are built from the ground up, and I really enjoy the intersection of logic and creativity. Whether I'm designing a new web app, writing Python algorithms, or diving deep into game engines to tweak core mechanics, I like building things that just work well. In my past roles, I've done a bit of everything—from assisting users at an IT Help Desk to developing fully functional web platforms and programming game logic. When I'm away from the keyboard, you can usually find me analyzing the cinematography of older movies or lifting weights. I believe in the importance of continuous learning and seek out opportunities to explore new technologies and methodologies.
